home.title: Welcome to ManVaig
home.subtitle: Pawn-shop marketplace — list items, receive offers.

login.title: ManVaig
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: ManVaig
register.termsCheckbox: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
register.errorDisplayNameLength: Display name must be at least 3 characters
register.errorEmailFormat: Please enter a valid email address
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.errorTermsRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
register.errorDuplicateEmail: An account with this email already exists
register.errorPasswordDigit: Password must contain at least one digit (0-9)
register.errorPasswordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
register.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

emailConfirmation.title: Check your email
emailConfirmation.description: We sent you a confirmation link. Click it to verify your email and unlock all features.
emailConfirmation.descriptionWithEmail: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to verify your email and unlock all features.
emailConfirmation.resendError: Could not resend email. Please try again.
emailConfirmation.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
emailConfirmation.confirmedDescription: Your email has been verified. You now have full access to all features.
emailConfirmation.errorDescription: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
emailConfirmation.inlineDescription: Please confirm your email to access this feature.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.profilePrivateDescription: Only you can see your profile
profile.avatarUploadError: Could not upload avatar. Please try again.
profile.profilePrivateMessage: This profile is private or does not exist.
profile.errorSaveFailed: Could not save profile. Please try again.
profile.errorLoadFailed: Could not load profile. Please try again.

items.title: My Items
items.emptyDescription: Start listing items to receive offers from buyers.
items.errorLoadFailed: Could not load items. Please try again.

itemForm.imagesHint: First image is the cover. Max 5 images, 5MB each. Drag to reorder, star to set cover.
itemForm.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the item, its condition, history...
itemForm.locationHint: Pre-filled from your profile. Change if item is elsewhere.
itemForm.pricing_fixed_desc: Set your price, buyers pay it
itemForm.pricing_offers_desc: Set a price, accept lower offers
itemForm.offersHint: Buyers can offer less than this price
itemForm.biddingHint: Bidding starts from this price and goes up
itemForm.bidStepHint: Minimum increment for each new bid
itemForm.antiSniperNote: Anti-sniper protection: if a bid is placed in the last 10 minutes, the auction automatically extends by 10 minutes.
itemForm.visibilityHint: Controls who can see this item
itemForm.guestOffersHint: Users without an account can submit offers (name + contact required)
itemForm.canShipHint: Item can be shipped to the buyer
itemForm.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This cannot be undone.
itemForm.errorTitleLength: Title must be between 3 and 100 characters
itemForm.errorPriceRequired: Price is required and must be greater than 0
itemForm.errorPriceDecimals: Price can have at most 2 decimal places
itemForm.errorMinOfferExceedsPrice: Minimum offer price cannot exceed the listed price
itemForm.errorMinBidPositive: Minimum bid must be greater than 0
itemForm.errorBidStepPositive: Bid step must be greater than 0
itemForm.errorAuctionEndMinDuration: Auction must end at least 1 hour from now
itemForm.errorAuctionStartRequired: Starting price is required for auctions
itemForm.errorTagLength: Each tag must be 30 characters or less
itemForm.errorImageType: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images are supported
itemForm.errorSaveFailed: Could not save item. Please try again.
itemForm.errorDeleteFailed: Could not delete item. Please try again.
